ns0:entry.ns0:title: CJackHwang/ds2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CJackHwang/ds2api
Language: go
Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Gentleman-Programming/engram
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/engram
Language: go
Persistent memory system for AI coding agents. Agent-agnostic Go binary with SQLite + FTS5, MCP server, HTTP API, CLI, and TUI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/Xray-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core
Language: go
Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/HiClaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/HiClaw
Language: go
An open-source Collaborative Multi-Agent OS for transparent, human-in-the-loop task coordination via Matrix rooms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bjdgyc/anylink
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bjdgyc/anylink
Language: go
AnyLink是一个企业级远程办公 ssl vpn 软件，可以支持多人同时在线使用。基于 openconnect 协议开发，并且借鉴了 ocserv 的开发思路，可以完全兼容 AnyConnect 客户端。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: canopy-network/canopy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/canopy-network/canopy
Language: go
The official go implementation of the Canopy Network protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dstotijn/hetty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dstotijn/hetty
Language: go
An HTTP toolkit for security research.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gastownhall/beads
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/beads
Language: go
Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gastownhall/gascity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/gascity
Language: go
Orchestration-builder SDK for multi-agent coding workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-vikunja/vikunja
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-vikunja/vikunja
Language: go
The to-do app to organize your life.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hatchet-dev/hatchet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hatchet-dev/hatchet
Language: go
🪓 Run Background Tasks at Scale

ns0:entry.ns0:title: knadh/listmonk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/knadh/listmonk
Language: go
High performance, self-hosted, newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. Single binary app.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krillinai/KrillinAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/krillinai/KrillinAI
Language: go
Video translation and dubbing tool powered by LLMs. The video translator offers 100 language translations and one-click full-process deployment. The video translation output is optimized for platforms like YouTube，TikTok. AI视频翻译配音工具，100种语言双向翻译，一键部署全流程，可以生抖音，小红书，哔哩哔哩，视频号，TikTok，Youtube等形态的内容成适配

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: putyy/res-downloader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/putyy/res-downloader
Language: go
视频号、小程序、抖音、快手、小红书、直播流、m3u8、酷狗、QQ音乐等常见网络资源下载!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shridarpatil/whatomate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shridarpatil/whatomate
Language: go
Whatomate is an open-source WhatsApp integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vxcontrol/pentagi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vxcontrol/pentagi
Language: go
Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks
